contactSection.title: Contact
contactSection.proposal: Are you interested in working with me or do you have a proposal?

heroSection.intro: Full Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js and Node.js, focused on building functional and scalable web applications.

social.title: Social Network (Final Project)
social.description: Full stack social network with JWT authentication, posts, comments and a user reaction system.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce - La Chacra
ecommerce.description: E-commerce with persistent cart, real payments (Mercado Pago), AWS S3 image storage, admin panel, stock synchronization, and automated testing with CI.

spotify.title: Sinestesia – Spotify Explorer
spotify.description: Spotify-based web application integrating private API with PKCE authentication. Includes dynamic search, playlist management and artist tracking.

inta.title: INTA – Agricultural Cost Visualizer
inta.description: Web application for agricultural cost estimation with modular calculation systems and interactive data visualization using Chart.js.
